settings_weekly_summary_sub: Get informed about each week's cosmic energy
home_complete_birth_details:
Complete your birth details
to unlock your daily horoscope
daily_text_0: Your natal chart is a map of the sky at the exact moment you took your first breath. It holds every answer you seek.
daily_text_1: The planets that watched over your birth are still speaking. Your chart is the language they left you.
daily_text_2: You were born at the perfect cosmic moment. Every placement in your chart was chosen by the universe for you.
daily_text_3: Your rising sign shapes how the world sees you. Your moon sign reveals what your soul craves in the dark.
daily_text_4: The stars did not place you here by accident. Your natal chart is proof of your divine design.
daily_text_5: Sun, Moon, and Rising — your cosmic trinity — together they paint the full portrait of who you are.
daily_text_6: You are a living astrology. Every breath carries the energy of the sky on the day you were born.
daily_text_7: Your chart does not define your fate. It reveals your gifts so you can choose your destiny freely.
daily_text_8: The universe encrypted your purpose in the positions of ten celestial bodies the moment you arrived.
daily_text_9: Your north node points to where you are going. Trust the direction the cosmos has always intended for you.
daily_text_10: Every planet in your chart is a teacher. Some lessons are gentle, some are fierce — all are sacred.
daily_text_11: You are not lost. You are exactly at the coordinate the stars marked out for this chapter of your story.
daily_text_12: Your Venus sign knows what your heart truly longs for, long before your mind finds the words.
daily_text_13: Your Mars placement is the fire inside you — the drive that no one else on Earth has in quite the same way.
daily_text_14: The universe does not make mistakes. Your birth chart is its most personal letter, written for you alone.
daily_text_15: Your 12th house holds the wisdom of past lives. The universe never wastes a single experience.
daily_text_16: When you feel lost, look up. The same sky that presided over your birth is still holding space for you.
daily_text_17: Your natal Mercury shows how your mind was built to receive truth. Trust your unique way of knowing.
daily_text_18: Every challenge in your chart is a doorway, not a wall. You were given exactly the lessons you can handle.
daily_text_19: Your Jupiter sign marks where abundance flows most naturally for you. Lean into that energy today.
daily_text_20: The cosmos put a specific kind of magic in your hands when you were born. Your chart is the instruction manual.
daily_text_21: You carry stardust from planets billions of miles away. There is nothing ordinary about your existence.
daily_text_22: Your Ascendant is the mask that becomes the face. In time, the role you play becomes who you truly are.
daily_text_23: The sky at your birth was a unique configuration that will never exist again. You are genuinely one of a kind.
daily_text_24: Your Saturn placement shows where your soul agreed to do the deepest work. Honor that sacred contract.
daily_text_25: In the silence between the stars, the universe composed a song. Your natal chart is the sheet music.
daily_text_26: The moon was in a particular sign when you arrived. That sign still rules the tides of your emotional world.
daily_text_27: Your south node shows where you came from. Your north node points to who you are becoming. Walk forward.
daily_text_28: You are the universe experiencing itself through this body, in this lifetime, with this chart. That is enough.
daily_text_29: Every transit is a conversation between the sky and your birth chart. The stars are always speaking to you.
explore_natal_chart_desc: Your horoscope for today is being prepared
explore_compatibility_desc: Discover your cosmic connection with others
explore_breathwork_desc: Balance your energy with guided breathing
explore_moon_rituals_desc: Align your intentions with the lunar cycle
explore_astrocartography_desc: Discover where your cosmic power lines flow across the world
explore_numerology_desc: Discover the hidden number energy of your name and birth date
num_no_profile: Complete your name and birth date in your profile to unlock your numerology analysis.
num_family_subtitle: Calculate the life path energies of your loved ones
num_family_pro_sub: Upgrade to Pro to unlock Family Numerology and explore your loved ones' cosmic energies together
num_couple_1_desc: Two independent souls united; leadership is shared in this partnership that honors freedom and individuality.
num_couple_2_desc: A deep emotional bond built on mutual understanding; sensitivity and intuition are the heart of this union.
num_couple_3_desc: A dynamic and inspiring partnership filled with joy, creativity, and constant discovery.
num_couple_4_desc: Built on stability and trust; a solid union where lasting foundations and enduring values are created together.
num_couple_5_desc: Full of excitement, freedom, and surprises; an adventure couple who truly live life to the fullest.
num_couple_6_desc: Love, compassion, and family values take center stage; a deep bond that nurtures, completes, and protects.
num_couple_7_desc: Spiritual depth and intellectual connection dominate; two deep souls searching for meaning together.
num_couple_8_desc: A partnership of ambition and achievement; a power couple that empowers each other toward great goals.
num_couple_9_desc: Sharing compassion and universal values; a union aimed at making the world a better place.
num_couple_11_desc: The meeting of higher consciousness and spiritual awakening; a master bond of mutual transformation and inspiration.
num_couple_22_desc: A partnership with a grand purpose; powerful souls who together build lasting and meaningful structures.
num_couple_33_desc: Unconditional love and devotion; a sacred bond of mutual teaching and shared service to humanity.
num_family_1_desc: A family of strong individuals who support each leadership energy and deeply value independence.
num_family_2_desc: Woven with deep emotional bonds, harmony, listening, and mutual support are at the heart of this family.
num_family_3_desc: Joy and creativity reign in this family, which loves self-expression and having fun together.
num_family_4_desc: Built on solid foundations and trust, this family prioritizes stability and discipline above all.
num_family_5_desc: Open to change and adventure, this family represents a dynamic bond that seeks new experiences together.
num_family_6_desc: Love, responsibility, and care are the cornerstones of this family, which nurtures and protects each other.
num_family_7_desc: Sharing spiritual and intellectual depth, this family walks together in search of meaning and wisdom.
num_family_8_desc: With a strong collective will, this family aims to achieve material and meaningful goals together.
num_family_9_desc: Compassion and humanitarian values define this family, which makes contributing to the world a shared purpose.
num_family_11_desc: Shaped by master number 11, this family is a rare whole built on intuition, spiritual awakening, and inspiration.
num_family_22_desc: Empowered by master number 22, this family has the potential to build lasting, meaningful structures from grand visions.
num_family_33_desc: Nourished by master number 33, this family embraces unconditional love, teaching, and universal service as its life purpose.
num_1_desc: Marked by leadership and independence, 1s forge their own path with determination and originality. They take risks and blaze new trails.
num_2_desc: Representing balance and sensitivity, 2s are natural mediators who bring harmony and peace to those around them.
num_3_desc: The number of joy and authentic expression, 3s shine in arts, communication, and social connection.
num_4_desc: Reliability and discipline define 4s, who patiently construct solid foundations and lasting success step by step.
num_5_desc: Full of change and adventure, 5s embrace new experiences with openness and adapt with remarkable natural ease.
num_6_desc: Love and responsibility characterize 6s, who show deep devotion to family, healing, and community.
num_7_desc: Analytical depth meets spiritual insight in 7s, who are always seeking truth, wisdom, and hidden meaning.
num_8_desc: Masters of ambition and material reality, 8s pursue great goals with fierce determination and drive.
num_9_desc: Compassion and universal love define 9s, who are born to serve, uplift, and inspire all of humanity.
num_11_desc: Master number 11 carries intuition and spiritual awakening. These are bearers of higher consciousness and inspiration.
num_22_desc: Master number 22 transforms grand visions into lasting, tangible reality with extraordinary power and vision.
num_33_desc: Master number 33 represents the highest expression of compassion, teaching, and selfless service to humanity.
compat_more_partners_pro_sub: Upgrade to Pro to analyze compatibility with up to 10 people.
moon_pro_sub: Discover how today's moon phase interacts with your natal chart — which house, planet, and emotional zone it activates.
natal_houses_pro_sub: Upgrade to Pro to unlock detailed interpretations for all 12 houses.
natal_birth_map_desc: Your complete astrological blueprint — personality, purpose, love, career & a 3-year cosmic forecast.
natal_birth_map_sheet_subtitle: A one-time purchase — your Birth Map is yours forever.
natal_birth_map_bullet_2: Soul purpose, karmic lessons & north node path
natal_birth_map_bullet_5: Export as PDF or Instagram Story
natal_complete_details: Tap here to complete your birth details and unlock your natal chart.
compat_no_partners_sub: Add someone to discover your cosmic compatibility.
moon_ritual_new_moon_desc: The New Moon opens a portal of infinite possibility. Sit in stillness, light a candle, and write your deepest desires on paper. The cosmos is ready to receive your call.
moon_ritual_waxing_crescent_desc: Your seeds are planted. Take inspired action and tend to your intentions daily. Every small, aligned step moves you closer to the life you are calling in.
moon_ritual_first_quarter_desc: The First Quarter brings challenges that test your commitment. This friction is your teacher. Recommit to your vision and take one bold, decisive action today.
moon_ritual_waxing_gibbous_desc: You are almost there. Review your progress, release what is not working, and fine-tune your approach. Patience now is the most powerful force in your arsenal.
moon_ritual_full_moon_desc: Under the Full Moon's radiant light, all is revealed. Write what you are ready to release and burn or bury the paper. Celebrate how far you have come — you are the cosmos.
moon_ritual_waning_gibbous_desc: Having received the full light of manifestation, it is time to give. Share your gifts, teach what you know, and extend gratitude for the abundance flowing through your life.
moon_ritual_last_quarter_desc: The Last Quarter calls for sacred release. Forgive yourself and others without condition. Let go of the stories, patterns, and beliefs that dim your light.
moon_ritual_waning_crescent_desc: You have done the deep work. Now rest, dream vividly, and allow the universe to prepare the next cycle. Trust the sacred timing of all things unfolding for you.
edit_profile_birth_calc_error: Could not calculate your birth chart. Check your birth city and try again.
astro_summary_para1: At the exact moment you were born, every planet occupied a precise angle in the sky — rising on the eastern horizon, setting in the west, culminating at its peak, or resting at its lowest. Projected onto a world map, these positions become lines of planetary influence crossing every continent.
astro_summary_para2: Every city you visit and every country you call home sits under the pull of different planetary lines — some amplifying your gifts, some calling you toward growth, and some offering the quiet of deep belonging.
astro_summary_para3_city: Born in {city}, you carry the cosmic signature of that exact sky wherever you travel.
astro_summary_para3_no_city: Your birth location carries a unique cosmic signature that follows you wherever you travel.
astro_summary_unlock: Unlock your full report to see all 8 planetary lines, world map, and personalised destination insights.
astro_planetary_lines_sub: 8 lines calculated from your birth moment
astro_planet_by_planet_sub: Tap each planet to read your detailed line interpretation
astro_power_regions_sub: Your planetary lines across the globe
astro_destiny_compass_sub: Your three most powerful global directions
astro_include_1: Detailed reading for all 8 planetary lines
astro_include_2: Astrocartography world map with your power lines
astro_include_5: Best regions for love, career & healing
astro_line_sun_reading: Where your Sun line rises, you are fully seen. Your authentic self shines without effort and people recognise your gifts immediately. Opportunities to lead appear naturally, and a lasting visible legacy becomes possible. Long-term residence here accelerates career recognition and personal authority.
astro_line_moon_reading: Your Moon line marks territory that feels like home — even on a first visit. Emotional bonds form deeply and quickly here. The landscape nourishes your inner world and heals old wounds. Ideal for settling down, raising a family, or retreating for profound personal renewal.
astro_line_venus_reading: Venus magnetises love and beauty wherever her line falls. Relationships formed in these regions carry rare depth and pleasure. Creativity flows effortlessly, and the environments themselves tend toward elegance. Romantic and professional partnerships formed here are unusually harmonious and long-lasting.
astro_line_mars_reading: Mars ignites. Physical energy is amplified here, and competitive environments feel invigorating rather than draining. Entrepreneurship, athletics, and bold ventures flourish. Beware: conflicts can intensify, so channel the fire consciously into purposeful action.
astro_line_jupiter_reading: Jupiter's line is universally beloved. Fortune flows naturally — doors open, opportunities multiply, and optimism becomes contagious. Higher education, philosophy, travel, and financial growth are all amplified. A wonderful destination for both short visits and extended stays.
astro_line_saturn_reading: Saturn demands dedication — but the rewards are unmatched in permanence. Work done along this line is of the highest quality and creates a legacy that outlasts you. Not a place for shortcuts; a place for forging character and building something that will endure across generations.
astro_line_uranus_reading: Uranus breaks patterns and invites radical change — the best kind. Unexpected breakthroughs arrive suddenly along this line. Original thinking is valued, and futuristic or tech-forward environments feel natural. Ideal for those ready to reinvent themselves or disrupt an entire field.
astro_line_neptune_reading: Neptune dissolves the boundary between self and cosmos. Creativity flows like water, intuition becomes prophetic, and spiritual experiences arise spontaneously. Art created here resonates far beyond the local audience. Ideal for healers, mystics, artists, and deep-sea dreamers.
astro_dest_career_why: Your Sun and Saturn lines converge here, creating an environment where your work is recognised and your legacy is built to last.
astro_dest_love_why: Venus and Neptune lines cross this region, heightening beauty, romantic connection, and artistic inspiration.
astro_dest_home_why: Your Moon line rests here. Emotional safety, belonging, and deep restoration are the gifts of these lands.
horoscope_empty: Complete your birth details to unlock your daily horoscope
bm_not_found_sub: Your cosmic blueprint hasn't been generated yet.
bm_header_label: ✦  B I R T H   M A P  ✦

compat_deep_report_sub: Get a full AI-powered analysis of your cosmic connection — emotional alignment, karmic bonds, communication patterns, and more.
compat_pro_sub:
Upgrade to unlock your full
deep compatibility report
compat_desc_kindred: Kindred Spirits — you share the same elemental energy, creating a natural and effortless flow between you.
compat_desc_complements: Cosmic Complements — your elements balance each other beautifully, sparking growth and mutual understanding.
compat_desc_tension: Interesting Tension — different rhythms can create both friction and fascination. The universe is nudging you both to expand.
compat_desc_challenge: Sacred Challenge — opposing elements, but every great story needs contrast. This connection calls for patience and deep curiosity.
stardust_daily_already: You've already claimed your reward today
stardust_daily_popup_body: Sign in every day to keep your streak and earn more Stardust!
stardust_bundle_soon_body: In-app Stardust purchases are coming soon. Stay tuned!
stardust_share_text: Join me on Cosmira — discover your cosmic self! Use my referral code {code} when you sign up and we both get rewarded.
aura_aries_desc: Your aura blazes with raw vitality and unstoppable drive. It flickers like open flame — bold, immediate, and impossible to ignore.
aura_taurus_desc: Your aura pulses with deep, stabilizing warmth. It grounds everyone around you in its rich, earthy glow.
aura_gemini_desc: Your aura shimmers in constant motion, sparkling like sunlight on water. It draws curious minds into its orbit.
aura_cancer_desc: Your aura glows with soft, nurturing light — iridescent and emotionally perceptive, like a calm tide beneath the moon.
aura_leo_desc: Your aura radiates with the warmth of the sun itself — golden, commanding, and uplifting. It illuminates every room you enter.
aura_virgo_desc: Your aura emits a clean, healing frequency — precise and purposeful, quietly restoring order wherever it flows.
aura_libra_desc: Your aura hums with elegance and harmony. It reaches gently outward, drawing beauty and balance into its field.
aura_scorpio_desc: Your aura is magnetic and profound, pulsing with hidden depths. It draws others in with an intensity that cannot be explained.
aura_sagittarius_desc: Your aura burns with philosophical fire and boundless optimism. It leaps outward like an arrow toward the horizon.
aura_capricorn_desc: Your aura has the density of ancient stone — disciplined, enduring, and quietly powerful. Time only deepens its strength.
aura_aquarius_desc: Your aura crackles with visionary energy, connecting across time and space. It vibrates at a frequency others haven't yet discovered.
aura_pisces_desc: Your aura dissolves borders between worlds, shimmering with intuition and empathy. It breathes with the rhythm of dreams.
astro_line_types_sub: Each planet casts four distinct lines across the globe
astro_lt_ac_desc: Where you radiate this planet's energy outward. Others perceive you as embodying its archetype — you appear more vital, magnetic, or powerful here.
astro_lt_dc_desc: Where you attract relationships that mirror this planet's qualities. Partners and allies drawn to you here carry this planetary archetype strongly.
astro_lt_mc_desc: Where this planet amplifies your career, reputation, and public standing. The world's stage opens professionally and recognition comes more naturally.
astro_lt_ic_desc: Where this planet shapes your home life, inner world, and sense of belonging. Deep personal transformation and ancestral healing occur here.
astro_lt_note: Your exact birth time determines which line type each planet casts and in which direction it runs.
astro_cities_sub: Specific locations where your planetary lines create peak resonance
astro_city_athens_reason: Your vitality, confidence, and leadership shine at full brightness. Athens activates solar presence — you are seen, celebrated, and deeply energised by this landscape.
astro_city_lisbon_reason: Beauty, art, and magnetic attraction define your experience here. Romantic encounters and creative projects flourish with effortless grace.
astro_city_tokyo_reason: Professional recognition and expansion reach their peak. Opportunities in business, education, or publishing arrive with unusual frequency and openness.
astro_city_reykjavik_reason: Deep emotional belonging and inner peace settle in. Reykjavik holds space for your most authentic self — a true soul home far from external expectation.
astro_city_sydney_reason: Radical reinvention and personal freedom take hold. Unexpected pivots become breakthroughs; your originality is welcomed and powerfully amplified.
astro_city_bali_reason: Spiritual connection and transcendent relationships bloom. Soulmate encounters, artistic collaborators, and profound healing await in this mystical zone.
astro_city_marrakech_reason: Drive, ambition, and physical vitality surge here. Marrakech activates your inner warrior — bold action produces swift, concrete, and lasting results.
astro_city_edinburgh_reason: Discipline, mastery, and lasting legacy come into focus. Long-term projects reach completion; institutions and structures align to support your ambitions.
astro_parans_sub: Where two of your planetary lines cross, a vortex of amplified energy forms
astro_parans_note: Parans are among the most potent locations in your personal astrocartography map — both lines activate simultaneously, compounding their influence.
astro_paran_barcelona_meaning: Creative abundance meets romantic magnetism. Barcelona is a rare zone where professional growth and love intersect — art, pleasure, and prosperity flow together with extraordinary ease. Expect doors to open that would remain closed elsewhere.
astro_paran_capetown_meaning: Whole-self integration and inner harmony converge. Cape Town holds the rare frequency of solar confidence and lunar depth in balance — a powerful location for healing, identity work, and authentic self-expression.
astro_paran_seoul_meaning: Innovation anchored by structure. Seoul bridges breakthrough thinking with disciplined execution — the ideal environment for building something original that actually lasts and reaches a wide audience.
astro_current_sub: How your birthplace shapes your baseline planetary experience
astro_current_para1: Your birthplace is the energetic zero-point of your entire astrocartography map. Every planetary line is calculated relative to this location — it is the anchor from which all other resonances radiate outward.
astro_current_para2: Living at or near your birthplace means operating within your natal frequency — the planetary energies are deeply familiar, comfortable, and sometimes subtly limiting. Growth often accelerates the moment you step beyond this zone.
astro_current_para3: Within 300 km of a planetary line you begin to feel its influence clearly. Within 700 km, a milder resonance activates. Even visiting a line location for a few weeks can shift your life trajectory in the direction of that planet's archetype.
astro_current_tip: Travel at least 1,500 km from your birthplace to begin experiencing a meaningfully different planetary field.
astro_current_activation_sub: Distance bands and their effect on planetary line strength
